name: Cairn
description: Little balanced stone stacks — each redraw nudges every stone, and somehow the cairns always settle again.

code.style: --stone1: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3)); --stone2: @p(var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4)); --c2h: @rand(14%, 24%); --rule: ( /* the top stone rests on the emitted height of the bottom one */ --c1w: @r(38, 62); --c1h: @r(18, 30); --c2w: @r(22, 40); --off1: @r(-4, 4); --off2: @r(-7, 7); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: calc((50 - @var(--c1w) / 2 + @var(--off1)) * 1%); bottom: 8%; width: calc(@var(--c1w) * 1%); height: calc(@var(--c1h) * 1%); border-radius: 46%; background: var(--stone1); transition: ease 700ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: calc((50 - @var(--c2w) / 2 + @var(--off2)) * 1%); bottom: calc(8% + @var(--c1h) * 0.85%); width: calc(@var(--c2w) * 1%); height: var(--c2h); border-radius: 46%; background: var(--stone2); transition: ease 700ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
